name: repers
description: Local-first Codex harness for preflight, task DAG planning, worker review, install hooks, and verifiable release packs.

interface.shortDescription: Preflight, plan, review, and package Codex repository work.
interface.longDescription: RePERS gives Codex a local-first workflow harness: discover reusable capabilities before editing, plan work as a task DAG, run or dispatch worker lanes, review evidence, install a conservative pre-commit hook, and publish a verifiable release pack.
defaultPrompt: Use RePERS to run a bug hunt.
Build and verify a RePERS release pack.
